query: INSERT INTO feedback_entries (scriptId, scriptName, feedbackText, createdAt) VALUES (0, 'GLOBAL — Writing Style & CTA Tone', 'Always write in a simple way that a 12-year-old would understand, and the way a real person would actually speak out loud. A CTA like "Tap below. 30 seconds. Free." sounds robotic — no real person talks like that. The language should feel natural, conversational, and human. Write how someone would say it to a friend, not how a lawyer or marketer would write it on a billboard.', NOW());
